parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ status: $json.decision, decision: $json.decision, decision_reasoning: $json.reasoning, decided_by_user_id: $json.decided_by_user_id, decided_at: $json.decided_at }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ source_type: 'agent', source_ref: 'w06-denial-' + $('Build Decision Update').item.json.approval.id, entry_type: 'finding', title: 'Decision Denied: ' + $('Build Decision Update').item.json.approval.action_type, raw_text: 'Denied with reasoning: ' + ($('Build Decision Update').item.json.reasoning || 'none'), summary_text: $('Build Decision Update').item.json.reasoning || null, category: 'system_log', department: 'systems', source_agent_id: $('Build Decision Update').item.json.approval.requesting_agent_id, confidence: 'medium', priority: 'normal', processed: true }) }}

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ ok: true, approval_id: $('Build Decision Update').item.json.approval.id, decision: $('Build Decision Update').item.json.decision, decision_log_id: (Array.isArray($json) ? $json[0]?.id : $json.id) || null }) }}
